top_stories.title: Tech workers urge DOD, Congress to withdraw Anthropic label as a supply-chain risk
top_stories.description: Tech workers have signed an open letter urging the Department of Defense to withdraw its designation of Anthropic as a "supply chain risk" and instead to settle the matter quietly.
top_stories.author: Rebecca Bellan
top_stories.content: Tech workers have signed an open letter urging the Department of Defense to withdraw its designation of Anthropic as a "supply chain risk" and instead to settle the matter quietly.

top_stories.title: Advancing independent research on AI alignment
top_stories.description: OpenAI commits $7.5M to The Alignment Project to fund independent AI alignment research, strengthening global efforts to address AGI safety and security risks.
top_stories.content: OpenAI commits $7.5M to The Alignment Project to fund independent AI alignment research, strengthening global efforts to address AGI safety and security risks.

top_stories.title: Zilliz Cloud Brings BYOC to Azure
top_stories.description: Zilliz, the company behind Milvus, the world’s most widely adopted open-source vector database, today announced the general availability of Zilliz Cloud BYOC (Bring Your Own Cloud) on Microsoft Azure. With this launch, Zilliz Cloud BYOC is now available across AWS, Google Cloud Platform, and Microsoft Azure—making Zilliz the first managed vector database provider to support BYOC... The post Zilliz Cloud Brings BYOC to Azure first appeared on AI-Tech Park.
top_stories.author: PR Newswire
top_stories.content: Zilliz, the company behind Milvus, the world’s most widely adopted open-source vector database, today announced the general availability of Zilliz Cloud BYOC (Bring Your Own Cloud) on Microsoft Azure. With this launch, Zilliz Cloud BYOC is now available across AWS, Google Cloud Platform, and Microsoft Azure—making Zilliz the first managed vector database provider to support BYOC... The post Zilliz Cloud Brings BYOC to Azure first appeared on AI-Tech Park.

top_stories.title: How Lendi revamped the refinance journey for its customers using agentic AI in 16 weeks using Amazon Bedrock
top_stories.description: This post details how Lendi Group built their AI-powered Home Loan Guardian using Amazon Bedrock, the challenges they faced, the architecture they implemented, and the significant business outcomes they’ve achieved. Their journey offers valuable insights for organizations that want to use generative AI to transform customer experiences while maintaining the human touch that builds trust and loyalty.
top_stories.author: Deepak Dalakoti
top_stories.content: This post details how Lendi Group built their AI-powered Home Loan Guardian using Amazon Bedrock, the challenges they faced, the architecture they implemented, and the significant business outcomes they’ve achieved. Their journey offers valuable insights for organizations that want to use generative AI to transform customer experiences while maintaining the human touch that builds trust and loyalty.

top_stories.title: Nimble raises $47M to scale agentic web search platform for enterprise AI
top_stories.description: Nimble announced today that it has raised $47 million in new funding to accelerate development of its agentic web search platform, expand its multi-agent research capabilities and scale up its governed real-time web data infrastructure for enterprise artificial intelligence deployments. Founded in 2021 as Thhe Data Company Technologies Inc., Nimble offers a real-time web search […] The post Nimble raises $47M to scale agentic web search platform for enterprise AI appeared first on SiliconANGLE.
